name: OpenBao
description: OpenBao is an open source secrets management platform for securely storing, accessing, and controlling sensitive data such as API keys, credentials, and encryption keys.

notes.text: OpenBao is installed but intentionally not auto-initialized. Run `cat ~/openbao.creds` for secure next steps.
This script does not store unseal keys or root token to disk.
Default install uses HTTP (`tls_disable=true`). Configure TLS in `/etc/openbao.d/openbao.hcl` before production use.
Release checksum/signature verification is not automated by this helper script.
